summary: Implemented L4a DETECT as pure module src/services/profile-opportunity.ts: per-project general-routing accumulator (deduped by todoId), file/dir/ext pattern capture, env-tunable conservative threshold (MERMAID_GENERAL_OVERUSE_THRESHOLD), no-matching-pack guard via existing routing inference, and a deduped pollNewOpportunities signal. 17 vitest unit tests pass; tsc clean on change-set.
